steps.title: Read the slope of line $k$
steps.content: Line $k$ is written in slope-intercept form: $$y=7x+\frac{1}{8}.$$ In $y=mx+b$, the slope is $m$, so line $k$ has slope $7$.

steps.title: Use the perpendicular slope shortcut
steps.content: Perpendicular lines have slopes that are opposite reciprocals. The opposite reciprocal of $7$ is $$-\frac{1}{7}.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is correct. Choice A uses the intercept $\frac{1}{8}$ incorrectly. Choice C is just the intercept. Choice D is the original slope, which would be parallel rather than perpendicular.
